zh.lifeSummary: 當Gottfried III. von Sponheim於1175年之後出生在德國海藍-普法爾茲巴德 可茲納賀波斯朋海姆時，他的父親Gottfried II. von Sponheim8850歲，母親Mathilde von Veldenz8849歲。他於1202年與Adelheid von Sayn結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1218年。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gottfried III. von Sponheim于1175年之后出生在德国海藍-普法爾茲巴德 可茲納賀波斯朋海姆时，他的父亲Gottfried II. von Sponheim8850岁，母亲Mathilde von Veldenz8849岁。他于1202年与Adelheid von Sayn结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1218年。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Gottfried
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from god, got ‘god’ + frid ‘peace’; borne by the 13th-century poet Gottfried von Strassburg.

nameMeanings.name: III.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Gottfried III. von Sponheim was born after 1175, in Burgsponheim, Bad Kreuznach, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, his father, Gottfried II. von Sponheim, was 8850 and his mother, Mathilde von Veldenz, was 8849. He married Adelheid von Sayn in 1202. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1218.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gottfried III. von Sponheim est né après 1175, à Burgsponheim, Bad Kreuznach, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, son père, Gottfried II. von Sponheim, avait 8850 ans et sa mère, Mathilde von Veldenz, avait 8849 ans. Il a épousé Adelheid von Sayn en 1202. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1218.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gottfried III. von Sponheim nach 1175 in Burgsponheim, Bad Kreuznach, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gottfried II. von Sponheim 8850 und seine Mutter Mathilde von Veldenz 8849. Er hat 1202 Adelheid von Sayn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1218.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gottfried III. von Sponheim è nato il dopo il 1175 nel Burgsponheim, Bad Kreuznach, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, il suo padre, Gottfried II. von Sponheim, aveva 8850 anni e il suo madre, Mathilde von Veldenz, aveva 8849 anni. Lui sposato Adelheid von Sayn nel 1202. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1218.

ja.lifeSummary: Gottfried III. von Sponheimが1175年以後にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズバド クレウズナチブルグスプオンヘイムで生まれた時，父Gottfried II. von Sponheimは8850歳，母Mathilde von Veldenzは8849歳であった。1202年にAdelheid von Saynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1218年に死去した。

ko.Bad Kreuznach, Bad Kreuznach, Rheinland-: 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 바드 크레우즈나치 바드 크레우즈나치
ko.lifeSummary: Gottfried III. von Sponheim(이)가 1175년 이후 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 바드 크레우즈나치 버그스폰하임에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gottfried II. von Sponheim(은)는 8850세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde von Veldenz(은)는 8849세였다. 그는 1202년 Adelheid von Sayn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1218년 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gottfried III. von Sponheim nasceu após 1175, em Burgsponheim, Bad Kreuznach, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, seu pai, Gottfried II. von Sponheim, tinha 8850 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde von Veldenz, tinha 8849 anos. Ele casou-se com Adelheid von Sayn em 1202. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1218.

ru.Bad Kreuznach, Bad Kreuznach, Rheinland-: бад креузнач, бад креузнач, раинланд-пфалз, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gottfried III. von Sponheim родился после 1175 г. в местности бургспоним, бад креузнач, раинланд-пфалз, Германия, его отцу по имени Gottfried II. von Sponheim было 8850 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde von Veldenz, 8849. Он женился на женщине по имени Adelheid von Sayn в 1202 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1218 г.

Se casó con Adelheid von Sayn en 1202. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1218.
